title: Watch the Fed, buy the dips
section_path: Watch the Fed, buy the dips
section_path_text: Watch the Fed, buy the dips
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this week:
The economic situation is about to deteriorate, as the forces that supported the global economy in the first half of the year are dissipating. September and October are usually bad months for the market. For investors, this is all good news.
